lesson.menu_desc: Reading + future with will / going to to make promises and talk about deadlines -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Deadlines & Promises -- Talking About the Future (will / going to)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 14 -- Deadlines & Promises

paras: On Monday morning, David asked Maísa about the big report for the client. The client needs it very soon, so there is a deadline. Maísa looked at her plan for the week and made a promise.
"I will send the report by Friday," she said. "Tonight, I am going to check all the numbers. Tomorrow, I am going to write the last part."

David was happy. "Please make sure everything is correct," he said. "The client wants it on time." Maísa answered, "Do not worry. There is no delay. I will call you as soon as it is ready. I promise."
On Thursday, Maísa finished her work early. She sent the report to David one day before the deadline. The client was very happy, and David said, "Thank you, Maísa. Great job!"

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: Maísa is late and cannot finish the report on time.
Maísa promises to send the report by Friday and sends it early.
Maísa asks David to write the report for the client.

items: Maísa promised to send the report by Friday.
The text says: "I will send the report by Friday," she said.
Maísa is going to check the numbers next week.
She is going to check them tonight, not next week: "Tonight, I am going to check all the numbers."
Maísa sent the report after the deadline.
She sent it early: "She sent the report to David one day before the deadline."
David wanted the report to be on time.
The text says: "The client wants it on time."

listenings.text: Hi Maisa, this is David. I have good news about the client project. I am going to start the new report on Monday. I promise it will be ready by Thursday. First, I am going to check all the numbers. Then I will write the summary. I want to send it on time, so there is no delay. If I have a problem, I will call you as soon as I can. Please make sure the client has my email. Thank you very much. Talk soon!

Hello, this is Sarah from the finance team. I want to tell you about my plan for this week. On Tuesday, I am going to finish the budget. The deadline is Friday, so I have time. I promise to send it before the weekend. I am not going to work late, but I will make sure it is correct. If there is a small delay, I will call the manager. I always want to send my work on time. Have a great day!

extra_audio.text: Good morning, David. Here is my plan for the report. Tonight, I am going to check the numbers. Tomorrow, I am going to write the summary. I promise to send it by Friday. Thank you very much.
